title: Persian-Style Cucumber Casserole
description: A refreshing and flavorful casserole that combines the best of Persian and French cuisine, perfect for a light dinner or lunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the sliced cucumber, chopped fresh dill, minced garlic, and lemon juice.
In a separate bowl, mix together the cubed French bread, crumbly feta cheese, and a pinch of salt.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the bread mixture.
Top the bread layer with the cucumber mixture.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of the casserole.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of bread on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Serve warm, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
